stage.action: Read .claude/context/agents.ndjson — match user intent to engine triggers
Classify task: bug-fix | new-feature | new-engine | security-gate | deployment | query
Load engine agent file from matched agents.ndjson entry agent_file field

stage.trigger: new feature with unclear scope OR new compliance framework OR new CSP support
stage.output: PRD or acceptance criteria doc in .claude/planning/
stage.skip_when: bug fix | routine engine change | known platform pattern | adding a single rule

stage.trigger: new engine OR major schema change (new table) OR cross-engine dependency change
stage.output: ADR in .claude/documentation/ARCHITECTURE-DECISIONS.md + schema SQL + API contract
stage.skip_when: bug fix | adding BFF view | rule authoring | UI component

gate.trigger: new engine OR new credential handling OR new IAM/network/auth endpoint
gate.frameworks: STRIDE, PASTA, MITRE ATT&CK for Cloud, OWASP SAMM Design, D3FEND
gate.blocks: development stage — cannot start dev without this gate passing

required_acs.ac: engine routing: which agent_file, pipeline_stage, depends_on from agents.ndjson
standard DB columns: finding_id, scan_run_id, tenant_id, account_id, severity, status, first_seen_at, last_seen_at
BFF contract: if new view — fetchView(page) returns exact shape with all required fields
RBAC matrix: 5 roles (platform_admin/org_admin/tenant_admin/analyst/viewer) × all new endpoints tested
image tag: new tag in format v-{engine}-{feature}{n} included in story

stage.output: complete story file — dev agent can implement cold with zero prior context

stage.reads: story file + engine agent file + agents.ndjson + api_patterns.xml

gate.trigger: any endpoint OR auth OR DB schema OR HTTP client code touched
gate.checklist: OWASP Top 10, tenant isolation, no hardcoded secrets, no latest image tag, require_permission() on all endpoints, no json.loads() on JSONB
gate.blocks: merge — code cannot merge without this gate passing

runs.test: bff_contract_test — fetchView returns all required fields with correct types
rbac_matrix_test — 5 roles × all new endpoints (expect 403 for viewer on sensitive engines)
integration_test — engine accepts scan_run_id, writes findings, returns correct schema

stage.on_failure: return to development stage — do not deploy with failing tests

steps.step: docker build -t yadavanup84/{engine}:{tag} -f engines/{engine}/Dockerfile . (from repo root)
confirm image tag and registry with user before push
verify running pod image matches intended tag (VSCode linter silently reverts YAML — always cross-check)

post_deploy.check: kubectl logs — no ERROR lines in first 50 lines after startup
fetchView smoke test — BFF view for this engine returns non-empty response
post_deploy.on_failure: immediate rollback via kubectl set image deployment/{engine}

session_end_update.action: update image tag row in MEMORY.md production image table
update _meta.refreshed_at in agents.ndjson if engine svc/port changed
update bff_contract.ndjson if BFF view shape changed

conflict_resolution.rule: Platform pattern (existing engine code) overrides SDLC methodology
Security framework requirements (STRIDE/PASTA/ATT&CK) override feature convenience
If ambiguous — cspm-orchestrator decides based on agents.ndjson; never escalate to user for routing

constitution_non_negotiables.rule: Multi-tenant always — every DB query scoped by tenant_id from AuthContext
Database-first — schema defined before code; standard columns mandatory on every findings table
BFF for charts/aggregates — fetchView(page) only; never add fallback/mock data in BFF handlers
Engine gateway for tables — paginated raw findings go direct to engine via ingress
No latest image tag — ever, in any K8s manifest
JSONB is already a dict — never call json.loads() on psycopg2 JSONB results
RBAC at every layer — require_permission() on every engine endpoint
